top3.sql:
SELECT s.State, SUM(f.`Enrollment (K-12)`) AS total_enrollment
FROM schools s
JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
WHERE s.School LIKE '%State Special%'
GROUP BY s.State
ORDER BY total_enrollment DESC;

SELECT s.School
FROM schools s
JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
WHERE s.School LIKE '%Special%' AND f.`School Type` = 'State Special'
GROUP BY s.School
ORDER BY SUM(f.`Enrollment (K-12)`) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT s.State, SUM(f.`Enrollment (K-12)`) AS total_enrollment
FROM schools s
JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
WHERE s.School LIKE '%State Special%'
GROUP BY s.State
ORDER BY total_enrollment DESC;

SELECT s.School
FROM schools s
JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
WHERE s.School LIKE '%Special%' AND f.`School Type` = 'State Special'
GROUP BY s.School
ORDER BY SUM(f.`Enrollment (K-12)`) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT s.State, SUM(f.`Enrollment (K-12)`) AS total_enrollment
FROM schools s
JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
WHERE s.School LIKE '%State Special%' AND f.`Low Grade` <= 12 AND f.`High Grade` >= 1
GROUP BY s.State
ORDER BY total_enrollment DESC;

SELECT s.State, SUM(f.`Enrollment (K-12)`) AS total_enrollment
FROM schools s
JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
WHERE s.School LIKE '%State Special%'
GROUP BY s.State
ORDER BY total_enrollment DESC;

SELECT s.School
FROM schools s
JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
WHERE s.School LIKE '%Special%' AND f.`School Type` = 'State Special'
GROUP BY s.School
ORDER BY SUM(f.`Enrollment (K-12)`) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT s.State, SUM(f.`Enrollment (K-12)`) AS total_enrollment
FROM schools s
JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
WHERE s.School LIKE '%State Special%' AND f.`Low Grade` <= 12 AND f.`High Grade` >= 1
GROUP BY s.State
ORDER BY total_enrollment DESC;

final.sql:
SELECT s.State, SUM(f.`Enrollment (K-12)`) AS total_enrollment
FROM schools s
JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
WHERE s.School LIKE '%State Special%'
GROUP BY s.State
ORDER BY total_enrollment DESC;
